title: IT Training & Certification School
description: A leading online IT training and certification platform — restructured around real learner goals, mapped to career and certification journeys, and built to scale.

card.blurb: A leading online IT training and certification platform helping people build technology careers through certifications and guided learning pathways.

lede: A leading online IT training and certification platform helping learners build technology careers through industry-recognized certifications, education pathways and workforce development programs.

meta.label: Scale
meta.value: From CEO vision to strategic solution

feature.caption: A modern, scalable platform guiding learners from exploration to certification.

pillars.title: CEO-led vision
pillars.body: I partnered closely with the CEO to translate his vision — grounded in deep customer insight — into a modern, scalable digital experience.

pillars.title: Architecture, restructured
pillars.body: I rebuilt the site architecture around real user goals and mapped clear learning and certification journeys.

pillars.title: Flexible by design
pillars.body: A system of components and templates that simplifies navigation today and supports future growth and expansion.

storyParagraphs: I worked side-by-side with the CEO to translate a deep understanding of customer needs, career journeys and learning pathways into a modern, scalable digital experience — one that could carry the brand forward as the product line grew.

I restructured the site architecture around real user goals, mapped learning and certification journeys, and designed a flexible system of components and templates that simplifies navigation while supporting future growth. The result: a more intuitive, customer-centered platform that guides users from exploration to certification with greater clarity, engagement and conversion.
storyImageAlt: IT training and certification platform interface
storyCaption: A flexible system designed around real learner journeys.

highlights.title: 6,500 → sub-1,000 pages
highlights.body: A sprawling ecosystem consolidated into a focused platform.

highlights.title: Architecture around real user goals
highlights.body: IA restructured to match how learners actually move forward.

highlights.title: Mapped certification & career journeys
highlights.body: Clear pathways from exploration to credential.

highlights.title: A flexible component & template system
highlights.body: Simpler navigation today; room to grow tomorrow.

ctaHeading: Have a platform that needs to scale without losing its learners?
